name: agentrail-service
description: Local OSS release candidate for the AgentRail task lifecycle API

scripts.demo: npm --prefix sdk/typescript ci && npm --prefix sdk/typescript run build && node scripts/agentrail-e2e-demo.mjs
scripts.demo:json: npm --prefix sdk/typescript ci && npm --prefix sdk/typescript run build && node scripts/agentrail-e2e-demo.mjs --json
scripts.test: npm --prefix sdk/typescript ci && npm --prefix sdk/typescript run build && npm run test:service
